title: tephrosia vohimenaensis
intro: Tephrosia vohimenaensis, also known as the Vohimena Tephrosia, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia vohimenaensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia vohimenaensis are often made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in decoctions to treat various health conditions.
